title: Media Production Intern
description:
Media Production Intern (Events & Content)

Ark Media Productions Pte Ltd | Singapore
Internship / Part-time (3–6 months)

Ark Media Productions is a Singapore-based media and event production company involved in live events, corporate shows, brand activations, and digital content. We are looking for committed and driven Media Interns who want real-world exposure in a high-pressure, fast-turnaround production environment.

This role is best suited for individuals who thrive under deadlines, enjoy hands-on work, and want to learn how real productions are executed—not just observed.

What You’ll Learn

  • Hands-on exposure to live event and media production

  • How to operate in fast-paced, deadline-driven environments

  • Event operations, show execution, and basic AV/media workflows

  • Content creation for social media and internal documentation

  • Professional communication, teamwork, and problem-solving under pressure

Who We’re Looking For

  • Comfortable interacting with clients, crew, and vendors

  • Familiar with Instagram, TikTok, or other social platforms

  • Able to work independently with clear instructions

  • Able to perform under pressure and adapt quickly to changes

  • Organized, proactive, and willing to learn

  • Reliable & accountable – punctuality and communication are non-negotiable

This is not a slow-paced role. Fast turnarounds and long days may occur during event periods. This role is ideal for interns who want real production experience and are comfortable working under pressure.

Responsibilities

  • Assist with event setup, on-site operations, and teardown

  • Support media production tasks (content prep, filming assistance, basic editing support where applicable)

  • Create simple social media content during downtime

  • Assist with uploads, documentation, and general operational tasks

  • Maintain basic tidiness of workspaces and production equipment

Internship Details

  • Work schedule:

    • 5.5-day work week

    • 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM

    • Additional hours during event periods may be required

    • Off days or rest time will be compensated when longer hours are worked

  • Duration: 3–6 months

  • Work location: In person (office, venues, and event sites)

Who Can Apply

  • University, ITE or Polytechnic students

  • Students pursuing media, film, communications, events, or related disciplines

  • No prior production experience required—attitude, resilience, and reliability matter most

Why Join Us

  • Genuine, hands-on production experience (not just admin work)

  • Exposure to real clients, live shows, and professional workflows

  • Opportunity to work in a fast-moving and dynamic environment

  • Upskilling opportunities, including access to recognised certification courses to support your future career development

  • Potential opportunities for longer-term or project-based roles after the internship

Applicants can also apply via email. Please send an updated resume and CV to
📩 mat@arkstream.sg

postedCompany.description: Ark Media Productions is a fully integrated brand activation agency. We drive brand actions through managing and producing turnkey live/ virtual experiences, engagements, and creatives. We pride ourselves on exceeding client expectations by delivering superior customer service as a seamless extension of your team. Our experienced, creative team of event production and creative media professionals is committed to excellence, enabling businesses to convert customer engagement into revenue, delivering an unparalleled event experience, where your success is our purpose.
postedCompany.name: ARK MEDIA PRODUCTIONS PTE. LTD.
